debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a : α
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount A R a (↑i) ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts: exact h.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic a n

refine indepFun_of_condDistrib_eq_const (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) ?_
  rw [(hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).map_eq]
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
    (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro y hy
  calc 𝓛[rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) | (fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ← y; 𝔓']
  _ = (𝔓'.map (fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1, ω)) [|(fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' {y}]).map
      (fun p ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) p.2) := by
    rw [Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    rfl
  _ = ν a := by
    rw [Measure.map_comp_stepsUntil_rewardByCount (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    · refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1)
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).symm.trans ?_
      exact condDistrib_rewardByCount_stepsUntil h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero
    · intro t ht
      rw [Measure.map_congr (ae_cond_of_forall_mem _ (fun ω hω ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq ht))]
      cases t with
      | top =>
        rw [cond_of_indepFun _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
        · exact (hasLaw_Z a (n + 1)).map_eq
        · exact hy
        · exact indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω,
            fun i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i (ω, fun _ _ ↦ 0))) (Y := fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
      | coe t =>
        rw [cond_of_condIndepFun (by fun_prop)]
        · exact reward_cond_action h a t (by
            rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
            refine measure_mono_null (fun ω hω ↦ action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe n.succ_ne_zero hω.1) ?_
            exact ht)
        · exact condIndepFun_fst_prod (measurable_indicator_stepsUntil_eq h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1) t)
            (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (condIndepFun_reward_stepsUntil_action' h a (n + 1) t)
        · exact measurable_indicator_stepsUntil_eq h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1) t (measurableSet_singleton _)
        · fun_prop
        · convert ht using 2
          rw [Set.inter_comm]
          congr 1 with ω
          simp [Set.indicator_apply, n.succ_ne_zero]
exact (h.iIndepFun_rewardByCount a).indepFun_single_family (Iic n) (n + 1) (by simp)

refine condDistrib_ae_eq_const_iff.1 ?_
  · exact (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (by simp)).aemeasurable
  · exact (measurable_rewardByCount_Iic h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a n).aemeasurable

  exact ae_eventuallyEq_pi.mpr fun i ↦ h.ae_eq_rewardByCount_eval a i

refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_const_iff_indepFun (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).aemeasurable (by fun_prop)).mpr ?_
  rw [(hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).map_eq]
  refine (condDistrib_comp_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).symm.trans ?_
  have h_cond : condDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1, fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)) 𝔓'
      =ᵐ[𝔓'.map (fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1, fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω))] Kernel.const _ (ν a) := by
    refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
    rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
    intro ⟨t, r⟩ ht
    simp only [Kernel.const_apply]
    cases t with
    | top =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)]
      · rw [cond_of_indepFun _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
        · exact (hasLaw_Z a (n + 1)).map_eq
        · rwa [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)] at ht
        · exact indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω, fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i (ω, fun _ _ ↦ 0)))
            (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
        exact fun ω _ ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top
    | coe t =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ R t ω.1)]
      · have h_indep : R t ⟂ᵢ[A t, h.measurable_A t; P] fun ω ↦ (IsAlgEnvSeq.hist A R (t - 1) ω, A t ω) :=
          IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action_action' h t (by grind)
        have h_vec : Measurable[mα.comap (A t)] fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1, fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) := by
          refine Measurable.indicator (measurable_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)) ?_
          exact measurableSet_eq_fun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
        rw [cond_of_condIndepFun (by fun_prop) (condIndepFun_fst_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) h_indep) _ (by fun_prop)]
        · exact reward_cond_action h a t (by
            rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
            refine fun h_zero ↦ ht (measure_mono_null (fun ω h_ω ↦ ?_) h_zero)
            simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Prod.mk.inj_iff] at h_ω ⊢
            exact ⟨h_ω.1, action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe n.succ_ne_zero h_ω.1⟩)
        · refine Measurable.indicator (measurable_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)) ?_
          exact measurableSet_eq_fun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
        exact fun ω _ ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe
  rw [Measure.comp_congr h_cond]
  have : IsProbabilityMeasure (𝔓'.map (fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1, fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω))) :=
    Measure.isProbabilityMeasure_map (by fun_prop)
  simp

have h_ae m : rewardByCount A R a m =ᵐ[𝔓'] fun ω ↦ ω.2 m a := rewardByCount_ae_eq_snd h a m
  refine IndepFun.ae_eq (h_ae (n + 1)) ?_ (Bandit.indepFun_snd_eval_eval_streamMeasure_Iic n a)
  filter_upwards [ae_all_iff.2 fun (i : Iic n) ↦ h_ae i] with ω h_eq
  ext i
  exact h_eq i

end Bandits
exact h.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic a n

refine indepFun_iff_ae_condDistrib_eq_const.mpr ?_
  rw [(hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).map_eq]
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro n' hn'
  rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)]
  · exact (condDistrib_rewardByCount_stepsUntil h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).trans
      (Filter.eventuallyEq_of_mem hn' (fun _ _ ↦ rfl))
  · exact ae_cond_of_forall_mem (measurableSet_preimage (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)) (fun ω hω ↦ by simp [hω])

refine IndepFun.of_condDistrib_ae_eq_const (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).map_eq.symm ?_
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have : (fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) = (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)) := by ext; rfl
  rw [this]
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro v hv
  sorry
exact (h.iIndepFun_rewardByCount a).indepFun_succ n

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have hX := measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)
  have hY := measurable_pi_lambda (fun i : Iic n ↦ measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a i)
  refine indepFun_iff_forall_measurableSet_preimage.m hX hY |>.2 fun B C hB hC ↦ ?_
  rw [measure_preimage_inter_eq_sum_nat_and_top (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) (by fun_prop),
    ← (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).map_eq, Measure.map_apply hX hB,
    Measure.tsum_measure_preimage_inter (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) (by fun_prop) (hY.measurableSet_preimage hC)]
  refine Ennreal.tsum_congr fun k ↦ ?_
  by_cases hk : 𝔓' ( (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {k}) = 0
  · rw [measure_mono_null (Set.inter_subset_right _ _) hk, measure_mono_null (Set.inter_subset_right _ _) hk, mul_zero]
  · rw [measure_inter_cond hk, measure_inter_cond hk, mul_assoc]
    congr 1
    cases k with
    | top =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)]
      · rw [cond_of_indepFun _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) hB]
        · exact (hasLaw_Z a (n + 1)).map_eq
        · rwa [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
        · exact indepFun_prod (X := fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω, fun i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω))
            (Y := fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
        exact fun ω ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top
    | coe k =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ R k ω.1)]
      · have h_indep : R k ⟂ᵢ[A k, hA k; P] (fun ω ↦ (IsAlgEnvSeq.hist A R (k - 1) ω, A k ω)) :=
          IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action_action' h k (by grind)
        have h_meas_joint : Measurable[mα.comap (A k)] (fun ω ↦ ({ω' | stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω' = ↑k}.indicator 1 ω,
            ({ω' | (fun i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω') ∈ C}.indicator 1 ω))) := by
          refine Measurable.indicator (measurable_indicator_stepsUntil_eq hA hR a (n + 1) k) ?_
          exact measurable_comap_indicator_stepsUntil_le hA hR a n k
        have h_ra := reward_cond_action h a k (by
          rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
          refine measure_mono_null (fun ω ↦ ?_) hk
          simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
          exact action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe (Nat.succ_ne_zero n))
        rw [cond_of_condIndepFun (by fun_prop) h_meas_joint (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), h_ra]
        exact condIndepFun_fst_prod (measurable_indicator_stepsUntil_eq hA hR a (n + 1) k) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) h_indep
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
        exact fun ω ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe

refine indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq_const.2 ?_
  rw [(hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).map_eq]
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (X := fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro y hy
  calc 𝓛[rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) | (fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a (↑i) ω) ← y; 𝔓']
  _ = (𝔓'.map (fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1, rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω))).comp
      ((𝔓'[|(fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' {y}]).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1)) := by
    rw [← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    rfl
  _ = ν a := by
    have : IsProbabilityMeasure ((𝔓'[|(fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' {y}]).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1)) :=
      Measure.isProbabilityMeasure_map (by fun_prop)
    simp_rw [Measure.comp_const (ν a)]
refine indepFun_of_ae_condDistrib_eq_const (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (h.condDistrib_rewardByCount_Iic a n)

refine indepFun_of_condDistrib_ae_eq (measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1))
    (measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i)) ?_

refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_const_iff_indepFun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).map_eq).mp ?_
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
    (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  have h_law : condDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1))
      (fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1, fun (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)) 𝔓'
      =ᵐ[(𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1, fun (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω))]
      Kernel.const _ (ν a) := by
    refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := fun ω ↦ (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1,
      fun (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
    rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
    rintro ⟨k, x⟩ hk
    cases k with
    | top =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)]
      · exact (hasLaw_Z a (n + 1)).map_eq
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
        exact fun ω h_eq ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top (by simpa using h_eq)
    | coe k =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ R k ω.1)]
      · exact reward_cond_action h a k (by
          rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
          refine measure_mono_null (fun ω hω ↦ ?_) hk
          exact action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe (Nat.succ_ne_zero n) (by simpa using hω))
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
        exact fun ω h_eq ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe (by simpa using h_eq)
  exact condDistrib_comp_right h_law (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

refine indepFun_iff_ae_condDistrib_eq.mpr ?_
  · exact (measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1)).aemeasurable
  · exact (measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i)).aemeasurable
  · rw [(hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).map_eq]
    refine condDistrib_ae_eq_of_measure_eq_comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) ?_
    simp_rw [Measure.comp_const, (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).map_eq]
    ext s hs
    simp_rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) hs, Measure.comp_apply (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) hs, Kernel.const_apply]
    simp_rw [measure_eq_sum_inter_stepsUntil A a (n + 1), Set.inter_assoc]
    rw [ENNReal.tsum_mul_left, ENNReal.tsum_congr]
    intro k
    by_cases hk : 𝔓' ((fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {k}) = 0
    · simp [measure_mono_null (Set.inter_subset_right _ _) hk]
    · have hX_eq : rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ⁻¹' s ∩ ((fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' t ∩ (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {k})
          = (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ⁻¹' s ∩ (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {k}) ∩ ((fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' t) := by
        ext ω; simp [Set.inter_comm, Set.inter_assoc]
      rw [hX_eq, measure_inter_cond _ (measure_ne_top _ _), reward_cond_stepsUntil h a (n + 1) k (Nat.succ_ne_zero n) hk]
      rw [Measure.ext_iff] at h_ra
      · specialize h_ra s hs
        rw [h_ra, ← measure_inter_cond _ (measure_ne_top _ _), Set.inter_comm]
        sorry -- the generalization of reward_cond_stepsUntil to include history

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  refine (indepFun_condDistrib_const (measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)).aemeasurable
    (measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a i)).aemeasurable (ν a)).1
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
    (Y := rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro x hx
  have h_law : 𝓛[rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) | (fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ← x; 𝔓']
      = (∑' k, (𝔓' ((fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' {x} ∩ (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {k}) /
        𝔓' ((fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' {x})) •
        𝓛[rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) | (fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ← x, (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ← k; 𝔓']) := by
    rw [Measure.cond_eq_sum_cond_inter_univ (μ := 𝔓') (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by simp)]
  rw [h_law]
  have h_const : ∀ k, 𝔓' ((fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' {x} ∩ (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {k}) ≠ 0 →
      𝓛[rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) | (fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ← x, (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ← k; 𝔓'] = ν a := by
    intro k hk
    cases k with
    | top =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)]
      · exact (hasLaw_Z a (n + 1)).map_eq
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem (by fun_prop) (fun ω hω ↦ ?_)
        simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hω
        exact rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top hω.2
    | coe k =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ R k ω.1)]
      · have h_indep : R k ⟂ᵢ[A k, hA k; P] (fun ω ↦ (hist A R (k - 1) ω, A k ω)) :=
          IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action_action' h k (by grind)
        have h_eq : 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R k ω.1 | fun ω ↦ (fun i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω, stepsUntil A a (n+1) ω.1) ← (x, ↑k); 𝔓']
            = 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R k ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A k ω.1 ← a; 𝔓'] := by
          refine cond_of_condIndepFun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) ?_
          refine condIndepFun_fst_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) ?_
          refine h_indep.of_measurable_right (hX := hA k) ?_
          refine measurable_comap_rewardByCount_stepsUntil hA hR a n k
        rw [h_eq, reward_cond_action h a k]
        rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
        refine fun h_zero ↦ hk (measure_mono_null (fun ω hω ↦ ?_) h_zero)
        simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hω
        exact action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe (by simp) hω.2
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem (by fun_prop) (fun ω hω ↦ ?_)
        simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hω
        exact rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe hω.2
  simp_rw [h_const]
  rw [ENNReal.sum_measure_preimage_singleton (fun k ↦ 𝔓' ((fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) ⁻¹' {x} ∩ (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {k}))]
  simp only [Set.preimage_univ, Set.inter_univ, Measure.cond_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _), ENNReal.div_self hx ENNReal.coe_ne_top, one_smul]

apply condDistrib_ae_eq_const_iff_indepFun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) |>.mp
  rw [(hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).map_eq]
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := fun ω i ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro x hx
  have h_law := (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).map_eq
  exact h_law.symm.trans (reward_cond_action h a (n + 1) (by sorry))

refine indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq_const.mpr ?_
  rw [(hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (by simp)).map_eq]
  exact condDistrib_rewardByCount_Iic h a n (by simp)

simp_rw [h.rewardByCount_eq_snd a]
  exact (indepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure ν (n + 1) a (Iic n) (by simp)).comp_snd

refine indepFun_iff_condDistrib_ae_eq_const.mpr ⟨(hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero).map_eq, ?_⟩
  have hX := measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1)
  have hY := measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i)
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_of_measurable hX hY).trans ?_
  have h_cond := condDistrib_rewardByCount_stepsUntil h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero
  refine (condDistrib_tower (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) hX (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).symm.trans ?_
  rw [h_cond]
  · simp
  · exact (𝔓').isProbabilityMeasure_map (by fun_prop)
exact (indepFun_rewardByCount h a).indepFun_Iic n
